title: Fresh Music Discs VR
description: A resource pack that adds 3D music discs tailored for Vivecraft!
body:
# Fresh Music Discs for Vivecraft

**A port of [Fresh Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-music-discs) by Cyber, made visually compatible with [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft).**

---

## 💿 About the Original Pack

> *This resource pack gives all Minecraft music discs unique and detailed 3D models, making each one visually distinct and easier to identify. Perfect for collectors, redstone DJs, or anyone who wants to add more flair to their jukebox setup! Fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft.*

---

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd4492d4e52655f165271421d1a32b9b145fb3f4_0.webp)

---

## ⬇️ Pack Options
* Recommended to install [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) to toggle 3d dropped item models.

---

## Required Mods on 1.21.5 and Below
To play on 1.21.4, 1.21.1, and 1.20.1, [Modefite](https://modrinth.com/mod/modefite-item-definition-backport) and [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) (if on Forge/NeoForge) are required.

---

## 🥽 Vivecraft Compatibility

This version ensures all custom disc models are rendered correctly in **Vivecraft's VR environment**, maintaining full immersion while holding them.

---

## 📦 Other Awesome Stuff for VR
* [🍎 Fresh Food VR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-food-vr)
* [🪣 Fresh Buckets VR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-buckets-vr)
* [🪴 Fresh Flowers and Plants VR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flowers-and-plants-vr)
* [📚 Better, Fresher 3D Books VR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-fresher-3d-books-vr)
* [💎 Fresh Ores and Ingots VR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-ores-and-ingots-vr)
* [🤾 VR Throwing Extensions](https://modrinth.com/mod/vr-throwing-extensions)
